nasb.text: Then they turned and departed, and put the little ones and the livestock and the valuables in front of them.

esv.text: So they turned and departed, putting the little ones and the livestock and the goods in front of them.

cnv.text: 他們就轉身離去，把婦孺和牲畜，以及財物，都放在前面。

ccb.text: 他们转身离去，儿女、牲畜和财物在队伍的前面。
